name: Drying Barbecued Beef Jerky
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Lean beef; flank steak; round roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into strips 1/2 inch thick.
2. Combine all marinade ingredients in a glass baking dish.
3. Add the beef strips, cover, and refrigerate overnight.
4. Drain the beef slices.
5. Dry in an electric dehydrator at 145°F until pliable.
6. Package in home-canning jars, food-grade plastic bags, or seal-by-heat food storage bags.
This recipe is from the "BALL BLUE BOOK".
